Package noppes.npcs.api.ability.type

Interface IAbilityTrap

  • All Superinterfaces:
    IAbility, IAbilityAction, IAbilityZone
    public interface IAbilityTrap
extends IAbilityZone
    API interface for Trap abilities. Proximity-triggered traps placed around the caster.

    • Method Detail

      • getTriggerRadius

        float getTriggerRadius()
        Returns:
        Radius in blocks at which entities trigger the trap.

      • setTriggerRadius

        void setTriggerRadius​(float radius)
        Parameters:
        radius - Trigger detection radius in blocks.

      • getArmTime

        int getArmTime()
        Returns:
        Time in ticks before the trap becomes active after placement.

      • setArmTime

        void setArmTime​(int ticks)
        Parameters:
        ticks - Arming time in ticks.

      • getMaxTriggers

        int getMaxTriggers()
        Returns:
        Maximum number of times the trap can trigger before expiring.

      • setMaxTriggers

        void setMaxTriggers​(int max)
        Parameters:
        max - Maximum trigger count.

      • getTriggerCooldown

        int getTriggerCooldown()
        Returns:
        Cooldown in ticks between consecutive triggers.

      • setTriggerCooldown

        void setTriggerCooldown​(int cooldown)
        Parameters:
        cooldown - Trigger cooldown in ticks.

      • getDamage

        float getDamage()
        Returns:
        Damage dealt when the trap triggers.

      • setDamage

        void setDamage​(float damage)
        Parameters:
        damage - Trigger damage amount.

      • getDamageRadius

        float getDamageRadius()
        Returns:
        Radius of the damage area when triggered, in blocks.

      • setDamageRadius

        void setDamageRadius​(float radius)
        Parameters:
        radius - Damage area radius in blocks.

      • getKnockback

        float getKnockback()
        Returns:
        Knockback strength applied to entities caught in the trigger.

      • setKnockback

        void setKnockback​(float knockback)
        Parameters:
        knockback - Knockback strength.

      • isVisible

        boolean isVisible()
        Returns:
        Whether the trap is visible to entities.

      • setVisible

        void setVisible​(boolean visible)
        Parameters:
        visible - Whether the trap is visible.
